item.title: âGoogle Chrome App - App Store
item.body:
Google Chrome
Fast & Secure, by Google
Free Â· InâApp Purchases
Also Included In
Chrome helps you do whatâs possible on the web. Download the fast, secure browser by Google.
GET THE BEST OF GOOGLE IN CHROME
â¢ SEARCH WITH GOOGLE - Search and get answers on Google fast. Use your voice to search hands-free.
â¢ GOOGLE LENS - Search what you see on your screen or with your camera.
â¢ GOOGLE TRANSLATE - Explore the web in 130+ languages. Translate entire sites in one click.
BROWSE WITH BEST-IN-CLASS SECURITY
â¢ ENHANCED PROTECTION MODE - Browse confidently with the highest level of Chromeâs security.
â¢ SAFETY CHECK - Get peace of mind with proactive safety alerts.
â¢ GOOGLE PASSWORD MANAGER - Securely generate and save passwords for fast sign-in, and get alerts if your passwords are at risk.
ACCESS YOUR CHROME ACROSS DEVICES
â¢ SYNC ACROSS DEVICES - Save your things (like bookmarks, tabs, and passwords) and easily access them when you sign in to Chrome on your phone, computer or tablet.
â¢ TAB GROUPS - Create tab groups to stay organized across devices.
â¢ AUTOFILL - Save time typing by autofilling your saved payments, addresses and passwords.
Thanks for choosing Chrome! This version includes:
â¢ Use reading mode to see a simplified version of any web page.
â¢ When you use YouTube Incognito, links you tap will open in Chrome Incognito.
â¢ You can now create tab groups on iPad.
â¢ Stability and performance improvements.
The developer, Google, indicated that the appâs privacy practices may include handling of data as described below. For more information, see the developerâs privacy policy .
Data Linked to You
The following data may be collected and linked to your identity:
- Financial Info
- Location
- Contact Info
- Contacts
- User Content
- Search History
- Browsing History
- Identifiers
- Usage Data
- Diagnostics
- Other Data
Data Not Linked to You
The following data may be collected but it is not linked to your identity:
- User Content
- Diagnostics
Accessibility
The developer has not yet indicated which accessibility features this app supports. Learn More
Information
